story.text:
# ✨ Carry Proof
**⿻ → 📜 → 🌐 → 🤝**
*aether · cosmological · (cosmological · the ⿻ itself)*

Bear the proof from prover-cluster to verifier-cluster across the dual-agent gap. The medium-of-propagation operation.

> Sun discloses. Moon reflects. Aether is what they both travel through.

*Keywords:* medium · propagation · gap · proof-transmission · cosmological
